description: Indian criminal gang active in Bihar, led by Ashok Mahto and Pintu Mahto. Responsible for the 2005 killing of MP Rajo Singh and numerous caste-related murders in the late 1990s. Engaged in a long-running rivalry with the Akhilesh Singh gang, rooted in caste conflict between Koeris and Bhumihars. The gang operated primarily in Nawada, Nalanda, and Sheikhpura districts.
